title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v0.55.3
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | patch | `v0.55.0` -> `v0.55.3` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.55.3`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.55.3)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.55.2...v0.55.3)

#### What's Changed

-   Change default image volume mode to "nullfs" on FreeBSD by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1573](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1573)
-   \[v0.55]\[CI-DOCS] remove zstd:chunked from docs by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1604](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1604)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/common/compare/v0.55.2...v0.55.3

### [`v0.55.2`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.55.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.55.1...v0.55.2)

-   libimage: harden lookup by digest
-   libimage: HasDifferentDigest: add InsecureSkipTLSVerify option

### [`v0.55.1`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.55.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.55.0...v0.55.1)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/common/compare/v0.55.0...v0.55.1
[\[v0.55\] Bump to v0.55.1](https://togithub.com/containers/common/commit/21fe31f90811b3b19bc0dce4affd8738e8d91c45)
[\[v.0.55\]Bump c/image to v5.26.1](https://togithub.com/containers/common/commit/28321b88bf28799032c74bbdab67888f0f587739)

</details>

comments.body: Renovate wants to downgrade c/image … let’s add a merge commit to c/image to help it.
https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2070 , and updating the c/image commit reference to include that merge commit, should help.
This should be autoclosed after https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2079 is merged.
